title: Israeli Forces Advance in Lebanon and Seize Land, as Hezbollah’s Fight Escalates
summary_full: The Israeli military said troops advanced to protect border towns from Hezbollah attacks, spurring fears that the government is weighing a wider ground war.
summary_public: The Israeli military said troops advanced to protect border towns from Hezbollah attacks, spurring fears that the government is weighing a wider ground war.
